summary: Iteration 19 - Tested new sidebar design and superseded status features. All major features working correctly.

ui_bugs.issue: Toast message shows 'Read-only: in review' for ALL users including approvers/admins who CAN edit. The functionality is correct (admin CAN edit fields), but the toast message is misleading.
ui_bugs.suggested_fix: Update toast logic to check isApprover before showing 'Read-only' message

issues: Console warnings about chart dimensions (-1,-1) - charts have size issues during sidebar toggle animations. Not blocking functionality.

sidebar_features.no_hover_expand: PASS - Sidebar stays collapsed when hovering (64px width)
sidebar_features.collapsed_sections: PASS - MAIN, MASTER, ADMIN section icons with labels visible
sidebar_features.flyout_panel: PASS - Click MASTER opens flyout with sub-items
sidebar_features.flyout_navigation: PASS - Click Customers navigates to /customers and closes flyout
sidebar_features.expanded_chevrons: PASS - Section toggle buttons with chevrons work
sidebar_features.estipro_logo: PASS - YASH + EstiPro logos visible in sidebar header
sidebar_features.no_blue_accent: PASS - No blue right-edge accent bar on active items

superseded_status.backend_new_version: PASS - Creating new version sets previous to 'superseded'
superseded_status.frontend_badge: PASS - 'Superseded' badge shown with gray styling in Projects list

in_review_permissions.admin_can_edit: PASS - Admin user can edit project name field in in_review project
in_review_permissions.approve_reject_visible: PASS - Approve/Reject buttons visible for admin
in_review_permissions.save_changes_visible: PASS - Save Changes button visible for approver

action_items: MINOR: Fix toast message in ProjectEstimator.js (lines 199-200) to not show 'Read-only: in review' for approvers who can edit
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 19 tested the new sidebar design (no hover expand, flyout panels, arrow toggle). Superseded status works when creating new version. Admin can edit in_review projects despite misleading toast message. All features from iteration 18 still working.
